{{Quote|Gungans from every city across the swamps stood ear to ear. Otoh Mandassa with Otoh Gunga, Oxon City with Umberbool City.|[[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]], about the Battle of Grassy Plains|audio=GunganCities.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
'''Otoh Mandassa''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] built and inhabited by the [[Amphibian/Legends|amphibian]] [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Species/Legends|race]] in the [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. During the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]<ref name="GB" /> in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' establishes that the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] occurred in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> the [[Trooper/Legends|troops]] of the [[Gungan Grand Army/Legends|Gungan Grand Army]] gathered on the [[Great Grass Plains/Legends|Great Grass Plains]] outside the [[Human/Legends|Human]] city of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] to [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|fight]] the [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Trade Federation Droid Army]]. Gungans from Otoh Mandassa participated in the battle along with their brethren from many other cities such as [[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]], [[Oxon City]] and [[Umberbool City]].<ref name="GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Otoh Mandassa was been mentioned in the [[2001]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]]
''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. The city is mentioned in the intro to the level "The Battle for Theed", the seventh level in the Gungan campaign.<ref name="GB" />
